$:/plugins/kookma/thinkup/comments/add-c.text:
<$reveal state="$:/status/IsReadOnly"type=match text=no default=no tag=div class=tc-comment-button>
<$button tooltip="add comment"actions={{$:/plugins/kookma/thinkup/comments/add-comment-button-actions}}class=tc-btn-invisible>
{{$:/plugins/kookma/thinkup/images/add-comment}}
</$button>
</$reveal>

$:/plugins/kookma/thinkup/comments/comme.text:
<$list filter=[all[tiddlers+shadows]role[comment]contains{!!title}sort[created]!is[draft]]>
<$link>{{!!creator}} at <$view field=modified template="0hh:0mm:0ss DDD DDth MMM YYYY"format=date/> <$list filter="[[$:/tags/Thinkup/CommentsToolbarButton]tagging[]!is[draft]]"variable=listItem> <$transclude tiddler=<>mode=inline/>
<$reveal type=match state=!!edit-mode text=yes> <$keyboard actions="<$action-setfield $tiddler={{!!title}}$field=edit-mode $value=no/>"key=ctrl+enter> <$keyboard actions="<$action-setfield $tiddler={{!!title}}$field=edit-mode $value=no/><$action-setfield $tiddler={{!!title}}$value={{!!saved-text}}$field=text/>"key=escape> <$transclude tiddler="$:/core/ui/EditTemplate/body"mode=block/> <$reveal type=nomatch state=!!edit-mode text=yes> <$transclude tiddler={{!!title}}mode=block/>

$:/plugins/kookma/thinkup/comments/heade.text:
\define display-original-comment()<$link/> \define find-original-comment(exclude) <$list filter=[{!!title}role[comment]] emptyMessage=<>variable=ignore> <$list filter="[list{!!title}sort[title]]-[enlist<__exclude__>]"> <$set filter="[enlist<__exclude__>][{!!title}]"name=newExclude> <$macrocall exclude=<>$name=find-original-comment/> \end <$list filter=[{!!title}role[comment]] variable=ignore>
This tiddler is a comment on <$list filter=[list{!!title}sort[title]]> <> <$list filter=[list{!!title}role[comment]sort[title]nth[]] variable=ignore>

Parent comments:

    <$list filter=[list{!!title}role[comment]sort[title]]>
  • <$link/>

$:/plugins/kookma/thinkup/comments/sideb.caption: Comments
$:/plugins/kookma/thinkup/comments/sideb.text:
<$list filter=[all[tiddlers+shadows]role[comment]has[modified]!sort[modified]eachday[modified]]>
<$view field=modified template='DDth MMM YYYY'format=date/> <$list filter=[all[tiddlers+shadows]role[comment]sameday:modified{!!modified}!sort[modified]]>
<$link>Comment by '<$view field=modifier>(anonymous)' on <$list filter=[list{!!title}sort[title]]> <$link/>

$:/plugins/kookma/thinkup/comments/toolb.text:
<$reveal state="$:/status/IsReadOnly"type=match text=no default=no tag=span>
<$reveal type=match state=!!edit-mode text=yes>
<$button>
<$action-setfield $tiddler={{!!title}}$field=edit-mode $value=no/>
<$action-setfield $tiddler={{!!title}}$value={{!!saved-text}}$field=text/>
cancel
</$button>
</$reveal>
</$reveal>

<$reveal state="$:/status/IsReadOnly"type=match text=no default=no tag=span>
<$reveal type=match state=!!edit-mode text=yes>
<$button>
<$action-deletetiddler $tiddler={{!!title}}/>
delete
</$button>
</$reveal>
</$reveal>

<$reveal state="$:/status/IsReadOnly"type=match text=no default=no tag=span>
<$reveal type=nomatch state=!!edit-mode text=yes>
<$button>
<$action-setfield $tiddler={{!!title}}$field=edit-mode $value=yes/>
<$action-setfield $tiddler={{!!title}}$value={{!!text}}$field=saved-text/>
edit
</$button>
</$reveal>
</$reveal>

<$reveal state="$:/status/IsReadOnly"type=match text=no default=no tag=span>
<$reveal type=match state=!!edit-mode text=yes>
<$button>
<$action-setfield $tiddler={{!!title}}$field=edit-mode $value=no/>
save
</$button>
</$reveal>
</$reveal>

$:/plugins/kookma/thinkup/history.text:
Full change log  https://kookma.github.io/TW-Thinkup/#ChangeLog

* ''0.6.0'' -- 2022.09.04 -- stable release on Tiddlywiki 5.2.3
* ''0.2.5'' -- 2021.11.19 -- first beta release (public)
* ''0.2.1'' -- 2021.09.19 -- node explorer is added
* ''0.2.0'' -- 2021.04.21 -- first concept

$:/plugins/kookma/thinkup/journalbook/ma.text:
\define stateTid()$:/state/thinkup/journal-book \define journalTag()$:/config/Thinkup/JournalBook/Tag \define yearFilter()[get[text]tagging[]get[created]format:date[YYYY]unique[]!sort[]] \define monthFilter()[get[text]tagging[]get[created]prefix{$(stateTid)$!!year}format:date[YYYY0MM]unique[]!sort[]] \define monthList() <$list filter=<>variable=month> <$button class={{{[matchthen[tc-btn-invisible tc-tiddlylink kk-thinkup-jb-selected]else[tc-btn-invisible tc-tiddlylink]]}}}setTitle=<>setTo=<>setField=month> <$text text={{{[addsuffix[151200]format:date[MMM]]}}}/>
\end \define vertical-tab()
<$let currentMonth={{{[get[month]]:else[subfilternth[]]}}}>
<>
<>
\end \define journal-list-monthly() <$let month={{{[get[month]]}}}> <$text text={{{[addsuffix[151200]format:date[MMM YYYY]]}}}/> <$list filter="[get[text]tagging[]]:filter[get[created]prefix]:and[sort[created]]"template="$:/plugins/kookma/thinkup/journalbook/template"> \end \define yearSelectAction() <$action-setfield $tiddler=<>$value=<>$field=year/> <$action-setfield $tiddler=<>$value={{{[subfilternth[]]}}}$field=month/> \end \define select-year() <$let currentYear={{{[get[year]]:else[subfilternth[]]}}}> <$list filter=<>variable=year> <$button class={{{[matchthen[tc-btn-invisible tc-tiddlylink kk-thinkup-jb-selected]else[tc-btn-invisible tc-tiddlylink]]}}}actions=<>> <$text text=<>/> \end \define initialize()
; Create the journal book :First set the main journal tag. This is important if you use several tags for Journal tiddlers :Second, set the year and month to initialize the book
<$select tiddler=<>default="Select Journal tag"> <$list filter="[enlist{$:/config/NewJournal/Tags}]"> <$list filter="[get[text]]"variable=null> <$button> initialize <$action-setfield $tiddler=<>$value={{{[subfilternth[]]}}}$field=year/> <$action-setfield $tiddler=<>$value={{{[subfilternth[]]}}}$field=month/> \end \define journal-book() <$list filter="[get[text]][get[year]]:and[count[]compare:number:eq[2]]"emptyMessage=<>variable=null> <><> \end

$:/plugins/kookma/thinkup/macros/empty-s.text:
\define navButton(label targetTiddler)
<$button to=<<__targetTiddler__>>class="tc-btn-invisible tc-tiddlylink">
$label$
</$button>
\end
\define btn-actions-todayJournal()<$list filter="[<today-journal>is[tiddler]]"emptyMessage={{$:/core/ui/Actions/new-journal}}><$action-navigate $to={{!!title}}$scroll=yes/>
\define todayJournal()
<$wikify text='<$macrocall format={{$:/config/NewJournal/Title}}$name=now/>'name=today-journal>
<$button actions=<<btn-actions-todayJournal>>class='tc-btn-invisible tc-tiddlylink'><<today-journal>></$button>

\end
\define randomTiddler(filter label)
<$let seed=<<now XXX>>minNum=1 maxNum={{{[subfilter<__filter__>count[]]}}}randNum={{{[<maxNum>subtract<minNum>multiply<seed>divide[999]add<minNum>round[]]}}}>
<$link to={{{[subfilter<__filter__>nth<randNum>]:else[subfilter<__filter__>nth[]]}}}>$label$</$link>

\end

<$let activetTab={{{[get[text]]}}}> <$list filter="[subfilter<__filter__>match]~[subfilter<__filter__>nth[]]"variable=currentTab> <$let contentStyle={{{[matchthen[display:block;]]}}}>

$:/plugins/kookma/thinkup/macros/tag-clo.text: \define getTags() <$list filter="[all[tiddlers]!prefix[$:/]tags[]!prefix[$:/]]$(extra_filter)$"> <$text text=[[/>{{{[{!!title}tagging[]count[]]}}}°≈°<><$text text=]]/> \end \define sortTags() <$list filter="[enlist!sortan[]]:filter[split[°≈°]nth[]compare:integer:gteq<__n__>]"> <$list filter=[{!!title}split[°≈°]last[]]><$text text=[[/><><$text text=]]/> \end \define tagcloud_showbycount(n:5, extrafilter) <$let extra_filter=<<__extrafilter__>>> <$wikify text=<>name=items> <$wikify text=<>name=sorted> <$list filter=<>> <$let count={{{[{!!title}tagging[]count[]]}}}> <><> \end

$:/plugins/kookma/thinkup/macros/tasks-e.text:
\define styleStateTid()$:/keepstate/dynamictables/TaskExplorer-stateTiddler/style
\define tidSearchinTasks()$:/state/tasks/dtable/search
\define newTask()
<$button actions={{$:/plugins/kookma/thinkup/KeyboardShortcuts/new-task}}class="btn btn-sm mr-1">New Task

\end
\define cleanTaskExplorerLogActions()
<$list filter="[<styleStateTid>indexes[]]:filter[!is[tiddler]]">
<$action-setfield $tiddler=<<styleStateTid>>$index={{!!title}}/>

\end
\define cleanTaskExplorerLog()
<$list filter="[<styleStateTid>indexes[]]:filter[!is[tiddler]]:and[count[]]"variable=no>
<$button actions=<<cleanTaskExplorerLogActions>>tooltip="Delete of leftover tiddlers"disabled={{{[<no>compare:integer:gteq[1]then[no]else[yes]]}}}class=tc-btn-invisible>Clean logs (<$text text=<<no>>/> tasks)</$button>

\end
\define taskStatistics()All tasks: <$count filter=[tag[Task]]/> | Filtered tasks: <$count filter="[subfilter<mainFilter>]"/>
\define selectFilter()
<$let Completed=[tag[Task]tag[Done]] Scheduled=[tag[Task]!tag[Done]has[due]] Overdue=[tag[Task]!tag[Done]!days:due[-1]] Today=[tag[Task]!tag[Done]days:due[0]] Tomorrow=[tag[Task]!tag[Done]days:due[1]!days:due[1]] Yesterday=[tag[Task]!tag[Done]days:due[-1]!days:due[-1]] Open=[tag[Task]!tag[Done]] All=[tag[Task]]>
Filter and search: <$select tiddler=<<tidSearchinTasks>>field=main-filter default=[tag[Task]] class=thinkup-task-explorer-select>
<option disabled>Filter by due</option>
<$list filter="All Open Scheduled Today Tomorrow Yesterday Overdue Completed">
<option value={{{[{!!title}match[Overdue]then<Overdue>][{!!title}match[Completed]then<Completed>][{!!title}match[Scheduled]then<Scheduled>][{!!title}match[Open]then<Open>][{!!title}match[All]then<All>][{!!title}match[Today]then<Today>][{!!title}match[Tomorrow]then<Tomorrow>][{!!title}match[Yesterday]then<Yesterday>]}}}><$view field=title/></option>
</$list>
</$select>

\end

$:/plugins/kookma/thinkup/readme.text:
; Thinkup
Think Up in [[Lexico|https://www.lexico.com/definition/think_up]] means: use one's ingenuity to invent or devise something. Thinkup is a Tiddlywiki plugin uses Zettlekasten method for note taking

;Code and demo
For learning plugin features, syntax, tutorial and examples see the plugin demo and code pages

* Demo: https://kookma.github.io/TWE-Mehregan/
* Code: https://github.com/kookma/TWE-Mehregan

$:/plugins/kookma/thinkup/settings/categ.caption: Category Tabs
$:/plugins/kookma/thinkup/settings/categ.text:
\import $:/plugins/kookma/thinkup/macros/definition
;Category tabs search box
:<$checkbox tiddler=<<tidShowSearchCategoryTab>> field=text checked=yes> Enable searchbox on category tabs</$checkbox>

<dl>
<dt>Exclude tabs (select to hide a category)</dt>
<$list filter="[[$:/tags/Thinkup]tagging[]]">
<dd><$checkbox tiddler=<<tidExcludeCtabsConfig>>index={{!!title}}checked=yes> <$view field=title/></$checkbox></dd>
</$list>

$:/plugins/kookma/thinkup/settings/node-.caption: Node Explorer
$:/plugins/kookma/thinkup/settings/node-.text:
\import $:/plugins/kookma/thinkup/macros/definition
;Node explorer filters (what to show node explorer)
:<$checkbox tiddler=<<tidNodeExplorerConfig>> index="links"         checked=yes> links</$checkbox>
:<$checkbox tiddler=<<tidNodeExplorerConfig>> index="backlinks"     checked=yes> backlinks</$checkbox>
:<$checkbox tiddler=<<tidNodeExplorerConfig>> index="tagging"       checked=yes> tagging</$checkbox>
:<$checkbox tiddler=<<tidNodeExplorerConfig>> index="transclusion"  checked=yes> transclusion</$checkbox>


;Node explorer display format
:<$radio tiddler=<<tidNodeExplorerConfig>> index="display"  value=table> dynamic table   </$radio>
:<$radio tiddler=<<tidNodeExplorerConfig>> index="display"  value=flat > simple flat list</$radio>

$:/plugins/kookma/thinkup/settings/smart.caption: Smart Tabs
$:/plugins/kookma/thinkup/settings/smart.text:
\import $:/plugins/kookma/thinkup/macros/definition
\define activateAction()<$action-setfield $tiddler=<<tidStabsConfig>>$field=text $value=[all[current]tag[myTag]]/>
\define radioAction(status:disabled)<$action-setfield $tiddler=<<tidStabsConfig>>$value="$status$"$field=status/>
\define select(description filter)<$radio tiddler=<<tidStabsConfig>>value=<<__filter__>>actions=<<radioAction>>field=text> $description$</$radio>
;Disable smart tabs
:<$checkbox tiddler=<<tidStabsConfig>>  
  field="text" checked=".__smart__tabs__disabled__" unchecked=" [all[current]!is[system]] " 
	uncheckactions=<<radioAction>>> Switch smart tabs</$checkbox>
	
:<$checkbox tiddler=<<tidJournalConfig>>  
  field="text" checked=".__smart__tabs__disabled__" unchecked=" [all[current]tag[Journal]] " 
	 > Swith smart tabs on Journals</$checkbox>	

<$reveal type=nomatch stateTitle=<<tidStabsConfig>>stateField=text text=.__smart__tabs__disabled__ default=show>

; Smart tabs filters (where display smart tabs)
: <<select "all tiddlers" " [all[current]] ">>
: <<select "all tiddlers except system tiddlers" " [all[current]!is[system]] ">>
: <<select "only tiddlers tagged 'smarttab'"     " [all[current]tag[smarttab]] ">>
:<$radio tiddler=<<tidStabsConfig>> field="status" value="enabled" 
         actions=<<activateAction>> > custom filter: </$radio><$edit-text tiddler=<<tidStabsConfig>> field="text" tag=input defualt=""
				 placeholder="enter a filter e.g. [all[current]tag[myTag]]" class="thinkup-stab-enablefilter"
         disabled={{{[<tidStabsConfig>get[status]match[enabled]then[no]else[yes]] }}}/>


<dl>
<dt>Exclude tabs (hide a specific tab)</dt>
<$list filter='[[$:/tags/Thinkup/SmartTab]tagging[]]'>
<dd><$checkbox tiddler=<<tidExcludeStabsConfig>>index={{!!title}}checked=yes> <$view field=tooltip><$view field=title/></$view></$checkbox></dd>
</$list>
</dl>

{{$:/plugins/kookma/thinkup/settings/node-explorer}}
;Create new smart tab
:{{$:/plugins/kookma/thinkup/templates/new-smart-tab}}

$:/plugins/kookma/thinkup/stabs/journal-.text:
\define activityFilter()[all[tiddlers]!is[system]!tag[Task]!has[draft.of]!match<currentTiddler>] :filter[sameday:created<thisdate>]
<$let thisdate={{!!created}}>
<$macrocall $name=table-dynamic filter=<<activityFilter>>fields='tbl-expand title tags modified'caption="''Tiddlers Created Today''"class=w-100 emptyMessage=' 'editButton=no/>

\define taskFilter()[tag[Task]] :filter[sameday:due<todayDate>]
<$let todayDate={{!!created}}>
<$macrocall $name=table-dynamic filter=<<taskFilter>>fields='tbl-checkbox tbl-expand title status'caption="''Today Tasks''"class=w-100 editButton=no emptyMessage=' 'stateTiddler=TaskExplorer-stateTiddler/>

$:/plugins/kookma/thinkup/templates/keyw.text:
\define mainFilter()[tag<currentTiddler>] [search:keywords<currentTiddler>]
<$set value=<<qualify [[$:/state/popup/keyword]]>>name=transclusion>
<$button class="tc-btn-invisible thinkup-keywords"popup=<<transclusion>>dragFilter=<<mainFilter>>>
<$text text={{!!title}}/>
</$button>
<$reveal state=<<transclusion>>type=popup position=below animate=yes class=tc-drop-down>
<$link/>
<hr>
<!---->
<$list filter=<<mainFilter>>template="$:/core/ui/ListItemTemplate"/>
</$reveal>

$:/plugins/kookma/thinkup/templates/new-.text:
\import $:/plugins/kookma/thinkup/macros/definition \import $:/plugins/kookma/thinkup/macros/searchbox <$tiddler tiddler=<>>
<$let new-item-title={{{[{!!title}removesuffix[s]]~[{!!title}]}}}> <$importvariables filter="[[$:/tags/Thinkup/Entry]tagging[]contains{!!title}]~$:/plugins/kookma/thinkup/templates/default"> <$button class="btn btn-sm"actions=<>> New <$text text=<>/>
<$reveal type=match state=<>text=yes default=no> <$macrocall label=""tempTiddler=<>$name=search-box/>
<$let searchTerm={{{[get[text]]}}}> <$count filter="[tag{!!title}!tag[$:/tags/Thinkup/Template]search:title]"/> entries <$list filter="[tag{!!title}!tag[$:/tags/Thinkup/Template]search:titlesort[title]]"template="$:/core/ui/ListItemTemplate"/>

\import $:/plugins/kookma/thinkup/macros/definition
\import $:/plugins/kookma/thinkup/macros/searchbox
\define createNewItem()
  <$action-sendmessage title=<<unusedtitle"New Smart Tab">>tags="$:/tags/Thinkup/SmartTab"icon="$:/plugins/kookma/thinkup/images/user-tab"tooltip="enter a meaninful short tooltip"text=<<content>>$message=tm-new-tiddler/>
\end
\define content()
<$button class="tc-btn-invisible tc-btn-mini"actions=<<createNewItem>>tooltip="create new smart tab"> 
{{$:/core/images/new-button}} Add new user smart tab

$:/plugins/kookma/thinkup/templates/sour.text:
\define createNewItem()
  <$action-sendmessage title=<<unusedtitle"""New $(new-item-title)$""">>tags="[[$(currentTiddler)$]]"author=""url=""caption=" long title..."year=""format="webpage report ebook blog newspaper podcast"rating="poor average good great"keywords=""$message=tm-new-tiddler/>
\end

$:/plugins/kookma/thinkup/ui/Settings.caption: Thinkup
$:/plugins/kookma/thinkup/ui/Settings.text:
\import $:/plugins/kookma/thinkup/macros/definition
These settings let you customize the behavior of Thinkup plugin.

---


;Show Thinkup setting in more sidebar
:<$checkbox tiddler="$:/plugins/kookma/thinkup/ui/Settings" tag="$:/tags/MoreSideBar"> Show setting in more sidebar</$checkbox>

---

<$list filter="[list[$:/plugins/kookma/thinkup/ui/Settings]]">
<$macrocall $name=details label={{!!caption}}src={{!!title}}status=open/>

$:/plugins/kookma/thinkup/viewtemplates/.text:
\import $:/plugins/kookma/thinkup/macros/definition \import $:/plugins/kookma/thinkup/macros/stabs <$reveal type=nomatch stateTitle=<>text=hide tag=div retain=yes animate=yes> <$list filter=[{!!title}tag[Journal]]>
<$macrocall tiddler={{!!title}}showInput={{{[{!!title}sameday:createdthen[yes]else[no]]}}}$name=interstitial/>
<$let stabsFilter={{{[get[text]]}}}> <$list filter="[subfiltermatch{!!title}nth[]!is[missing]]"variable=ignore> <$macrocall filter="[all[tiddlers+shadows]tag[$:/tags/Thinkup/SmartTab/Journal]!has[draft.of]]"$name=thinkup-stabs/>

\define format()author year format url rating \define showField() <$list filter="[{!!title}has]"variable=null> <$text text=<>/><$transclude field=<>/> \end <$list filter=[{!!title}tag[Source]]> <$list filter="[enlist]"variable=field><>
Title<$transclude field=caption/>

\define rowStyle()color:<>; background-color:<>; \define btncheckactions() <$action-setfield $tiddler=<>$index=<>$value=<>/> <$action-setfield $tiddler=<>status=complete/> \end \define btnuncheckactions()<$action-setfield $tiddler=<>$index=<>/><$action-setfield $tiddler=<>status=rework/> <$list filter=[{!!title}tag[Task]]>
<$button to="Tasks Explorer"tooltip="Open Tasks Explorer"class=tc-btn-invisible>{{$:/plugins/kookma/thinkup/images/tasks}} Tasks Explorer <$let currentRecord={{!!title}}tempTableStyle="$:/keepstate/dynamictables/TaskExplorer-stateTiddler/style"> <$checkbox class=thinkup-btn-task-done tiddler=<>checkactions=<>uncheckactions=<>tag=Done> {{$:/plugins/kookma/thinkup/images/todo}} <$list filter=[{!!title}contains:tags[Done]] emptyMessage=Done> Undone
<$list filter=[{!!text}trim[]is[blank]]>

\define priority-levels()[[no priority]] [[very low]] low normal high [[very high]] \define task-priority() <$select tiddler={{!!title}}field=priority tooltip='task priority'class=thinkup-task-explorer-select> \end <$list filter=[{!!title}tag[Task]!tag[Done]]> <$let priority-class={{{thinkup-task-info[enlistzth{!!priority}split[ ]join[-]addprefix[thinkup-task-priority-]]:and[join[ ]]}}}> | {{||$:/plugins/kookma/pikaday/ui/buttons/TodoDueDate}} | >title=priority>{{$:/plugins/kookma/thinkup/images/flag}}<>
